tech_name: HIPAA (Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act)
notes: Cited as governing regulation raising liability for improperly sanitized hard drives containing medical data.
EU Waste Electrical and Electronic Equipment order; effective August 2005; less than 10% of UK firms were compliance-ready in summer 2003.
Only commercially viable method for eliminating data: overwrite every sector multiple times with random patterns; labor-intensive without specialized equipment.
Destruction method used for non-working drives where overwriting is not possible.
